news.title: Wilson celebrates student achievement at annual leadership event
news.summary_en: From top academic performers to standout entrepreneurs, the Wilson College of Business Leadership Celebration honored the students who are leading, achieving and making a real impact — on campus and beyond.

news.title: What is ABSN? Your guide to accelerated nursing education
news.summary_en: Here’s what you should know if you’re looking at accelerated BSN programs and trying to figure out what works best for you!
